svg.title: Routed Wi-Fi Talos worker architecture
svg.desc: Omni on the management NUC asks the provider on the Wi-Fi CachyOS host to create a Talos virtual machine. Firewalla routes the virtual-machine subnet to the host, while Cilium routes a unique pod subnet to each Talos node.
